title: Amtech M0825 170mm (6.5") Pull Saw
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DURABLE: This 170mm (6.5") saw works with a pull cutting action and has a SK5 steel blade and 10 TPI (teeth per inch)
QUICK BLADE CHANGE: Supplied with two blades, this pull saw has a quick change blade system and a comfortable soft grip handle
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 170mm PULL SAW See more
